other_observers: none; No, bird a returning bird from previous winter and first detected this fall by somebody else, I don't know whom.
description: See photos. Zonotrichia sparrow, larger than nearby Gambel's WCSP, with yellow center of crown from mid crown to bill surrounded by moderately broad darkish brown lateral crown stripes. No white below lateral crown stripe or eyeline to suggest hybrid status.Behaviors: Feeding on ground with one immature Gambel's WCSPCall: not heardPlumage: adult molting basic to alternate
